assertions.text: The response writes a sprint state snapshot to .simonk/session-<timestamp>.md.
It includes recent commits from both repositories.
It provides a re-entry prompt template for the next session.

cases.prompt: context export please — save this session for hand-off

assertions.text: The response produces a pending tasks list as part of the export.
It generates the session snapshot file and a next-session re-entry prompt template.
The skill writes a sprint state snapshot under .simonk/ with recent commits and pending tasks.
It outputs a re-entry prompt template for resuming in the next session.
